def positive_path_resolve_or_expanduser_in_loop():
    rule_id = "path_resolve_or_expanduser_in_loop"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Path resolution helpers such as resolve() or expanduser() run inside loops on invariant inputs."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
